positive: An intricate, highly detailed symmetrical mandala design featuring stylized celestial bodies, interwoven geometric patterns, and bioluminescent flora. The color palette is deep indigo, vibrant cyan, cosmic gold, and matte black, rendered with strong, clean silhouettes and crisp linework. The composition must be perfectly centered and suitable for apparel printing. Focus on an art deco fusion with cosmic gothic elements, providing maximal visual interest and depth. High contrast, perfect symmetry, vector art style, minimalist complexity, ink on white background.
